role: Deputy Commander, IRGC Saheb al-Zaman Corps, Isfahan Province (d. 8 March 2026)
bio: Ali Hashemi served as Deputy Commander of the IRGC Saheb al-Zaman Corps, the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) provincial corps in Isfahan Province. He was killed on 8 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 8 March 2026. IRGC Saheb al-Zaman Corps (Isfahan Province) Deputy Commander. Slug disambiguated from other Ali Hashemi entries.
